_comment: bump WANDER_VERSION in main.py AND version in desktop.json each release.
notes: Record & replay the exact path you drive (Pro), an auto-stop 'safe zone' that returns your iPhone to its real GPS when a route arrives, background scheduling that keeps running while Wander is open (survives reloads and restarts), and native Google sign-in. Plus important security & stability fixes — Wander now listens only on your own computer.
